_comment: Signal topology for the living-room A/V system. Declared once; scenarios reference it. A link's destination port is the input value to select on the sink device. See docs/design/scenarios/scenario_system_redesign.md (Layer 0) and docs/ui_backend_contract.md.

positions.ld: Set the Dodocus RCA hub to the LD position (ensure AMP mode is selected)
positions.vhs: Set the Dodocus RCA hub to the VHS position (ensure AMP mode is selected)
positions.reel: Set the Dodocus RCA hub to the Reel position (ensure AMP mode is selected)
positions.tape: Set the Dodocus RCA hub to the Tape position (ensure AMP mode is selected)
positions.phono: Set the Dodocus RCA hub to the Phono position (ensure AMP mode is selected)

positions.in: Power on the Sugden Masterclass PA4 phono corrector

ordering.reason: TV must be on before the eMotiva (ARC handshake)
eMotiva on before TV switches to HDMI2, else ARC takes over the audio
TV settles on HDMI2 before the eMotiva routes its input (HDMI-ARC)
Zappiti powers on only after the eMotiva is on HDMI1 (observed)
upscaler auto-powers with the LD; give it ~4-5s before switching its input
upscaler auto-powers with the VHS; give it ~4-5s before switching its input
